zh.Nanteuil-le-Haudouin, Senlis, Oise, Pica: 法國皮卡迪奧易澤利斯南托易爾勒-豪度易
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelide de Béthune於大約1193年出生在法國時，她的父親Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel40歲，母親Matilda DE TENREMONDE24歲。她於1215年與Gaucher II de Nanteuil結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1256年享年64歲。

zh-hans.Nanteuil-le-Haudouin, Senlis, Oise, Pica: 法国皮卡迪奧易澤利斯南托易爾勒-豪度易
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelide de Béthune于大约1193年出生在法国时，她的父亲Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel40岁，母亲Matilda DE TENREMONDE24岁。她于1215年与Gaucher II de Nanteuil结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1256年享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béthune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Adelide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelide de Béthune was born about 1193, in France, her father, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, was 40 and her mother, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, was 24. She married Gaucher II de Nanteuil in 1215. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1256, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelide de Béthune est née environ 1193, à France, son père, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Gaucher II de Nanteuil en 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1256, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelide de Béthune um 1193 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel 40 und ihre Mutter Matilda DE TENREMONDE 24. Sie hat 1215 Gaucher II de Nanteuil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1256 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelide de Béthune è nata il circa 1193 nel Francia, sua padre, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Gaucher II de Nanteuil nel 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1256, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Nanteuil-le-Haudouin, Senlis, Oise, Pica: フランスピカーディオイゼセンリスナンテウイル-レ-ハウドウイン
ja.lifeSummary: Adelide de Béthuneが約1193年にフランスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israelは40歳，母Matilda DE TENREMONDEは24歳であった。1215年にGaucher II de Nanteuilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1256年に64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelide de Béthune(이)가 대략 1193년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda DE TENREMONDE(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1215년 Gaucher II de Nanteuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelide de Béthune nasceu aproximadamente 1193, em França, seu pai, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Gaucher II de Nanteuil em 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1256, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelide de Béthune родилась около 1193 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda DE TENREMONDE, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gaucher II de Nanteuil в 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1256 г. в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelide de Béthune nació aproximadamente 1193, en Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Bethune II, Robert the Red, Crusader 1177 Israel, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Matilda DE TENREMONDE, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gaucher II de Nanteuil en 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1256, a la edad de 64 años.
